mapper.select:
select IFNULL(count(distinct user_id),0) num from lkt_mch_browse
user_id, DATE_FORMAT(add_time,'%Y-%m-%d'),

SELECT a.user_id, a.token, a.EVENT, a.store_id, a.mch_id, a.mobile, a.add_time FROM ( SELECT a.user_id, a.token, a.EVENT, a.store_id, a.mch_id, b.mobile, max( a.add_time ) over(partition by a.user_id) add_time, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by a.user_id) AS top FROM lkt_mch_browse a LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
) AS a WHERE a.top < 2 ORDER BY a.add_time DESC limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}
SELECT count(distinct a.user_id) FROM lkt_mch_browse a left join lkt_user as b on a.user_id = b.user_id

SELECT CONCAT(hour_value, '时') AS time, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0) AS value FROM ( SELECT HOUR(add_time) AS hour_value, user_id FROM lkt_mch_browse WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND mch_id = #{mchId} AND DATE(add_time) = DATE(#{date}) ) AS subquery GROUP BY hour_value ORDER BY hour_value;
